message:
test(fcp-core): Add comprehensive capability golden vector tests (flywheel_connectors-nlz4)

Add 82 tests covering capability token verification:
- COSE_Sign1 token parsing (valid/malformed/truncated CBOR, signature verification)
- Token field validation (timing, zone binding, operation/resource constraints)
- Grant verification (grant_object_ids claim handling)
- Checkpoint freshness (chk_id/chk_seq for staleness detection)
- Holder proof verification (holder_node claim binding)
- Issuer verification (issuer claim and allowlist checking)
- Adversarial attack scenarios (replay, escalation, tampering, spoofing)

All tests pass with cargo test -p fcp-core.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
